name: Lucky
description: You have a number of Luck Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus and can spend them on the following benefits. Advantage: When you make a D20 Test, you can spend 1 Luck Point to give yourself Advantage on the roll. Disadvantage: When a creature rolls an attack roll against you, you can spend 1 Luck Point to impose Disadvantage on that roll. Regain Points: You regain all expended Luck Points when you finish a Long Rest.
